calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Aug-28-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Arlene Howell.
Petitioner: Romeo Arambula, present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: Joseph Alexnader Chierici Ruiz, was sworn and examined.
Co-Petitioner/Minor's Mother: Roxanne Ruiz, not present but signed the Petition consenting to the name change.
No objections to the proposed change of name of the minor were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: Romeo Alexander Arambula Ruiz.
Decree signed in open court.
